_readme: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your real values. config.json is git-ignored and must never be committed.

notion._readme: Create one integration per workspace at notion.so/my-integrations. Use read-only capability unless write-back features are explicitly enabled.

social_media._label: Hussam / Vista — Social Media Control Center
social_media._description: Shared database managed by Hussam. Contains social media tasks, media assets, meeting agendas, and items needing your review or approval.

personal._description: Your private Notion workspace. Contains personal reminders, private task list, follow-ups, and items you track independently from Hussam.

daftra._readme: Your Daftra subdomain and API key. Find your API key at https://{subdomain}.daftra.com/account/api. Never commit config.json.

proxy._readme: bind must stay 127.0.0.1 — do not change to 0.0.0.0 or the proxy becomes reachable from other machines on your network.
